title: trigonochloa uniflora
intro: Trigonochloa uniflora, also known as the Single-flowered Trigonochloa or Niuhi, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Trigonochloa uniflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and boost the immune system. Trigonochloa uniflora can be prepared as a tea by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by making a decoction with the roots and stems for various herbal remedies.
